scripts.dev: pnpm exec alchemy dev alchemy.run.ts --stage dev_$USER
scripts.alchemy:dev: pnpm exec alchemy dev alchemy.run.ts --stage dev_$USER
scripts.alchemy:plan:ci: pnpm exec alchemy plan stacks/github.ts --stage prod --profile ${ALCHEMY_BOOTSTRAP_PROFILE:-ceird-admin-global}
scripts.alchemy:bootstrap-ci: pnpm exec alchemy deploy stacks/github.ts --stage prod --profile ${ALCHEMY_BOOTSTRAP_PROFILE:-ceird-admin-global}
scripts.alchemy:deploy:prod: pnpm exec alchemy deploy alchemy.run.ts --stage prod
